title: Cybersecurity Phishing Detector
summary: Score phishing risk from message content and metadata and surface suspicious indicators to analysts.
knowledge_base: Cybersecurity Phishing Detector is positioned as a Cybersecurity starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Score phishing risk from message content and metadata and surface suspicious indicators to analysts.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on cyber, phishing, detection.
